findings.summary: The dogfood graph is populated; vendored standards remain intentionally outside it as always-applied instructions.
The model-orchestration standard, lookup, tests, and active wiring were removed after forensic review; history remains in the review and decision notes.

Previously CLAUDE.md, the managed blocks, pack/OVERVIEW.md, pack/README.md, and pack/adapters/INSTALL.md said '18-archetype catalog'; ui-archetype-catalog.md enumerates 16 (A1-A4,B1-B4,C1,D1-D3,E1-E2,F1-F2). All source occurrences corrected to 16 and install re-synced from pack/.
findings.evidence: ui-archetype-catalog.md count = 16; grep shows no remaining '18-archetype' in source
